political.s: VF does not maintain a corporate PAC and reported $22,085 in political contributions and $340,000 in lobbying expenditures in 2024. The company deploys government affairs strategies without regard to private political preferences of leadership and states it does not make ballot initiative contributions or participate in electioneering communications.

charity.s: The VF Foundation granted nearly $3.5 million to 43 organizations in 2024, focusing on outdoor access, women's empowerment, and sustainable innovation. The Foundation has distributed over $66 million since 2002 and operates matching gift programs for employees, emphasizing community development and environmental stewardship.
charity.focus: Outdoor access, women's empowerment, sustainable innovation, community development

environment.s: VF achieved 64% recycled polyester in 2024, exceeding its 2026 target early, but Scope 3 emissions remain 19% above 2017 baseline. Company has science-based targets approved by SBTi for 55% reduction in Scope 1&2 emissions by 2030 but supply chain emissions are declining only slowly. Environmental achievements in materials sourcing are offset by ongoing supply chain challenges.

labor.s: VF's Worker & Community Development program has improved lives of over 1 million people ahead of schedule. Company prohibits forced labor, child labor, and establishes wage/benefits standards. Global Compliance Principles address freedom of association and working conditions. However, no specific OSHA/NLRB violation data was found in available sources.

dei.s: VF maintains robust Inclusion, Diversity, Equity and Action (IDEA) strategy with public 2030 goals: gender parity at director level globally and 25% BIPOC representation in US leadership. Company achieved 19% BIPOC representation in US leadership (FY23) and has integrated IDEA goals into executive compensation. Established Council to Advance Racial Equity with specific commitments.

animals.s: Smartwool uses ZQ-certified merino wool exclusively and implemented mulesing-free requirements in 2005. However, PETA investigations in 2023-2024 documented abuse at ZQ-certified New Zealand facilities, with four shearers criminally charged. Good On You rates Smartwool 'Good' for animal welfare policy but notes certification concerns exist.

guns.s: No information found regarding VF Corporation's involvement in firearms manufacturing or sales. The company focuses on apparel, footwear, and accessories.

privacy.s: No comprehensive privacy policy documentation was found in available sources regarding VF Corporation's data practices or consumer privacy standards.

execPay.s: CEO Bracken Darrell's total compensation was $10.7 million in FY2025 (down 20.8% from $13.5 million in FY2024). CEO pay ratio was 334:1 versus median employee in FY2024. Compensation heavily weighted toward variable pay (90% for CEO), with 81% average for other executives, tied to performance metrics.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
